creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
It seems that those bugs never get any attention :-(

With the most recent qemu-static and the very same build procedure (not so magic if one has to clearly separate the sources for the jail's build and the system's!), poudriere starts building the desired subset of the ports tree as expected and build binaries. I haven't had the chance to check whether those binaries are runnable on my Pine64, but that is another matter.

The "magic" within here was definitely in qemu-magic.
